titleStmt.title: SII 26.792: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 792. (A.R. No. 741 of 1909.) PŪRATTUKŌYIL, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva: Year 11, Kaṉṉi (Puraṭṭāśi) śu. [. .], Wednesday, Svāti = 1261 A.D., August 31. The tithi was śu. 4.

summary.p: This inscription is also badly damaged.

It records a gift made by the ūravar of Mēlaik-Kaḍuvaṉkuḍi in [Muduśōṟ]kuḍi-nāḍu in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Kōṉāḍu alias Kaḍalaḍaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻavaḷanāḍu, of the village Kāṉā[ṟṟu] belonging to the paṟṟu of the above-mentioned village, to Tirumuttīśuram-uḍaiyār of the village, as tax-free daṉmadāṉa and as tirunāmattukkāṇi. It is stated that this gift-village was to the west of Kāraimaḍai on the boundary of Puṉṉattūr alias Viśaiyapañcharanallūr, tirunāmattukkāṇi of the temple, to the north of Karuppūr and Mēlai-Māṉāṅguḷam, to the east of [Pu]ḍuttaṟṟūr and to the south of Iḷaṅgavēṉikuṟichchi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakkrava
ttikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu
kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu yum putaṉkiḻamai
yum peṟṟa cotināḷ koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭaco
ḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟattukku kū kaṟkuṭi nāṭṭu melaikkaṭuvaṉkuṭi
Ūravaromum Uṭaiyār tirumutticurammuṭaiya romum muk
yatevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakku śrīuruttira śrīmā[ hecura] koyilil Ātitaṇṭecura
Itaṉmatāṉa Iṟaiyilip piṟamāṇam paṇṇi kkuṭuttārk kaṅkāṇiceyvārkaḷuk
ku ṉ maṉamikkaṇṭanallānakkap� laiyā Eṅkaḷ paṟṟāṉa kāṉāṟṟu
kiḻpāṟkkellai nnāyaṉāṟ tiruṉāmattukkāṇi puṉṉattūraṉ vicaiyapañcaranallūr
Ellaiyāṉa kāraimaṭaikku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai karuppūr Ellaikkum me
lai māṉāṅkuḷattu Ellaikkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai puṭuttaṟṟūr Ellai
kku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Iḷaṅkaveṉikuṟicci Ellaikkut teṟkum Āka Icai
melnokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum
kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟukaḷum kuḷamuṅ koppu maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa pirāptikaḷum Uḷppaṭa nā
ṅkaḷ Innāyiṉārkkut tirukkaimalarāl Utakam paṇṇiṉa paṭiyile tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyi
liyākak koṇṭu ḷākavum Ippaṭikalli
lum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Inta ṉkellaiyum tiruccūlatā
paṉam paṇṇikkoḷḷakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu taṉmatāṉa Iṟaiyi
lippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirumutticuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil
koyilk kaṇakku śrī Uruttira śrī māheśvarak kaṅkāṇi koyil
Digital edition of SII 26.792 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
